name: Tadpole
description: A calm aquatic creature that exists mostly as food within the koi pond. It swims in groups near the surface and flees as soon as anything threatens it.
behavior: It swims aimlessly near the surface, sometimes in groups, and makes faint little chirps underwater. When struck, it simply speeds up and flees without fighting back.
interactionWithPlayer: It is completely passive and mainly serves as a food source in the pond. If attacked, it flees quickly, but it is still one of the easiest underwater targets.
interactionWithCreatures: The pond's real predators, especially diving bell spiders and the koi fish, hunt it often. The spiders usually prefer water fleas, but they still eat tadpoles when they get the chance.
strategy: A few dagger strikes are enough. They are soft targets, so the only real concern is reaching them before they swim too far away.
